features.title: Privileged mutation governance
features.description: Owner authentication, the tamper-evident audit ledger, and exact-body change contracts protect every governed write.

remediation.summary: Repair the exact failed ledger, authentication, or change-contract check before enabling writes.

features.title: Guarded infrastructure lifecycle
features.description: Project-confined service control, stateful-service separation, verified backups/restores, and staged updates are loaded.

remediation.summary: Use the bounded service, backup, restore, and update panels; do not bypass post-start hooks.

features.title: Operational evidence and assurance
features.description: Restore drills, SLOs, capacity evidence, desired state, change intelligence, response drills, deployment assurance, and update readiness form one retained proof chain.

remediation.summary: Open the failed evidence subsystem, preserve its ledger, and follow the generated deterministic response plan.

features.title: Readiness regression history
features.description: Every feature-state vector change is deduplicated, deployment-correlated, classified, and sealed into an append-only HMAC chain.

remediation.summary: Preserve the database and HMAC key, verify backups, and restore the last known valid pair before recording more transitions.

features.title: RabbitMQ recovery proof
features.description: Copied admin and game broker states boot under their original node identities in sequential, disposable, networkless containers with bounded resources and name-free topology proof.

remediation.summary: Inspect the private recovery receipt, repair only the named backup/image/configuration failure, then repeat the isolated canary.

features.title: Credential lifecycle posture
features.description: Activation-aware credential presence, private permissions, material-change age, declared consumers, backup coverage, and a tamper-evident rotation history are loaded without returning values or fingerprints.

remediation.summary: Repair only the named source, permission, rotation, or backup finding; preserve ledger keys with their dependent history.

features.title: Adaptive map farm
features.description: Dynamic demand, warm retention, memory-aware eviction, and evidence-qualified gradual retention recommendations are active.

remediation.summary: Inspect the persisted profile, map modes, demand leases, memory floor, and last worker error.

features.title: Retained metrics and history
features.description: Prometheus, node, container, database, RabbitMQ, and DASH-native collectors retain operational history.

remediation.summary: Load the metrics overlay and restore the exact failed collector or scrape target.

features.title: Player and progression administration
features.description: Guarded items, native runtime actions, vehicles, progression, reputation, journeys, faction, and character-slot workflows are loaded.

remediation.summary: Repair only the failed command transport, catalog, or feature gate; preserve per-action preview and confirmation.

features.title: World, guild, and Landsraad administration
features.description: World-state inspection and the promoted guild, Landsraad, respawn, marker, claim, permission, access-code, Communinet, tutorial, and vendor paths are enabled.

remediation.summary: Use the exact promoted first-party function path and keep the seven-day Landsraad/Coriolis invariant.

features.title: Content, packages, blueprints, and economy
features.description: Typed settings, events, bundles, care packages, Solido blueprints, augments, database tooling, and exchange operations are loaded.

remediation.summary: Restore the reviewed catalog/config or the specific guarded database/economy gate.

features.title: Creator and server modding tools
features.description: Base design/gallery, recoverable base retirement, presets, cosmetics, and confined addon lifecycle are loaded.

remediation.summary: Use previews and disposable canaries; direct live base placement remains intentionally unclaimed.

features.title: Moderation and connection history
features.description: Privacy-bounded sessions, heatmaps, security events, cases, and repeated native kick enforcement are active.

remediation.summary: Inspect the moderation ledger and native kick transport without persisting raw peer IP addresses.

features.title: Community rewards, shop, and engagement
features.description: Wallets, shop/kits, tracks, vote/payment webhooks, movement-aware rewards, and offline delivery are enabled.

remediation.summary: Verify the isolated ledger and run an identity-bound purchase/delivery canary.

features.title: Discord operations and status bot
features.description: The permissioned adapter and full Gateway bot surface are enabled but require operator-owned Discord credentials for READY proof.

remediation.summary: Supply operator-owned Discord application, guild, and bot credentials, then run the documented READY/interaction canary.

features.title: Federated admin login
features.description: OIDC or Discord OAuth login is loaded with PKCE and exact subject-to-local-RBAC mapping.

remediation.summary: Create the provider application, configure the HTTPS callback and subject mapping, and retain the owner recovery token.

features.title: Signed outbound webhooks
features.description: Bounded retrying outbound events are HMAC-signed and constrained to reviewed destinations.

remediation.summary: Configure a reviewed HTTPS destination and secret, then run its receiver canary.

features.title: Signed federated public directory
features.description: The server publishes a short-lived Ed25519 descriptor and the self-hosted pull directory independently verifies it.

remediation.summary: Repair the exact descriptor URL, static publication, signature, freshness, or reviewed source collection failure.

features.title: Guarded multi-Sietch topology
features.description: Additional isolated Survival dimensions can be planned and reconciled through the hostname-gated topology tool.

remediation.summary: Use the guarded topology status/plan path and preserve deterministic dimension ports and saved-data isolation.

features.title: Advertised-address and routing repair
features.description: The hostname-gated public-IP monitor and LAN reflection tooling detect and safely repair advertised-address drift.

remediation.summary: Review dry-run evidence first, then apply through the hostname-gated address/TLS lifecycle.

features.title: Encrypted backup archives
features.description: Verified OpenPGP/restic backup encryption and encrypted-only offsite transport are supported.

remediation.summary: Select and verify the recovery recipient fingerprint before enabling encrypted archive output.
